name: Assigning instead of Comparing
description: The code uses an assignment operator (=) instead of a comparison operator (==) in a conditional expression. This causes the variable to be overwritten and the condition to evaluate based on the assigned value rather than performing the intended comparison, leading to incorrect program logic.
detection_pattern: CONTROL node containing an assignment operation where a comparison was intended. Look for TRANSFORM (assignment) inside a CONTROL (conditional branch) where the data flow overwrites a variable instead of evaluating it.
